title: Oil Rally Accelerates as Traders Price in Real Supply Disruption
summary: May WTI crude oil surged sharply in the holiday-shortened week ending April 3, settling at $111.54, up $11.90 or +11.94%. The move was driven by a combination of geopolitical escalation, supply disruption risks, and growing concerns about global oil infrastructure security. Traders were forced to r…

title: China Sets 2029 Deadline to Shut Down Outdated Petrochemical Plants
summary: China plans to phase out some of its outdated petrochemical plants by 2029 and upgrade others, under new directives issued by the authorities on Friday. The Chinese authorities will review which facilities will be upgraded and which will be closed, using lists of outdated petrochemical plants compi…

title: Europe must prepare for ‘long-lasting’ energy shock, EU warns
summary: Energy commissioner says bloc is assessing fuel rationing and releasing more oil from strategic reserves

title: Hackers steal $280mn from decentralised finance crypto exchange Drift
summary: Loss equates to about half of total US dollar value on deposit with platform popular for trading perpetual derivatives
